admissible_completion_class: faithful finite *-reps of the frozen path algebra refining Q8/Omega8/ABCD/terminal data
admission_tests: M1, equivariance under tripartite projectors, anomaly compatibility, finite readout

admissible_completion_class: endpoint/terminal/cylinder/record/filtration/conditional-expectation/profinite refinements with a readout to K(9,11,13)
admission_tests: M1, automorphism-equivariant, root/orientation-free, finite trace, declared scale cocycle

admissible_completion_class: basis-free common sector with simultaneous maps from L_archive/QUQ/Feshbach/log-det/S_DE; Riesz only with internally-fixed contour
admission_tests: M1, internal coordinate observable, sign/positivity, compatibility with finite w_N + phi-semigroup
rejected_if: hand-picked 2D basis; CPL/DESI/FLRW; desired law written as map

admissible_completion_class: frozen functionals (terminal/holonomy/Riesz/parity/Q8/partite/Feshbach/Sturmian) nonzero on exactly one branch section
admission_tests: branch-sensitive, relabel-invariant, mass-independent, compatible with finite Green resolvent

admissible_completion_class: profinite-increment / history-tower singular-value / scene-native phi3 / external spectral-triple / Wodzicki-Dixmier passport
admission_tests: canonical operator, ordered singular values, ordinary log-Cesaro limit, state-independence, identification with mu2/Delta_alpha
rejected_if: generalized trace chosen to return the value; finite-spectrum residue
